de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor

Class LabelCollector

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTVisitor
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.LabelCollector
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Visitor

    public class LabelCollector
extends JavaASTVisitor
    Collects all labels found in a given program.
